_source: Carried from KW_Data_2026-04-12. Amazon.com domain not scraped (automated run). PPC data estimated from SC_Data_2026-04-13 campaign totals. BSR estimated based on prior trend. 2 ad conversions this period vs 1 prior.

tracked_keywords._notes: Second consecutive conversion week. ACoS 43.9% — trending toward 33.5% breakeven. Monitor for one more week before scaling bids.

tracked_keywords._notes: FIRST CONVERSION — ACoS 32.9% below 33.5% breakeven. Most efficient keyword in portfolio. Consider +10-15% bid increase.
EXP-023 queued to add 'small dogs' to title. Add as exact match keyword at $1.20 bid.

tracked_keywords.keyword: wireless stainless steel pet water fountain
tracked_keywords._notes: Pet-focused variant — zero conversions ongoing. Consider pausing if no conversion in next 2 weeks.
Auto campaign — zero conversions. Auto campaign pause would eliminate this wasted spend ($7.50/week).
7/10 competitors use 'battery operated'. High opportunity keyword. Untargeted for 11+ days. Priority add after auto campaign review.
Rechargeable variant — untargeted. High relevance to product.

bsr_tracker.bsr_note: BSR improved ~3,400 positions from yesterday on estimated 1 fountain sale today. Consistent with April sales trend showing gradual improvement.

keyword_summary.wow_note: Converting keywords went from 1 to 2 this week. Portfolio ACoS improved from 104% to 58% — significant directional improvement. Review Cerebro if accessible for 'battery operated cat fountain' volume validation.
